SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-05-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-05-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-05-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY GWENDOLYN WESTBROOK--CEO. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SORRELLS, BRANDYN WILLIAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UNITED COUNCIL OF HUMAN SERVICES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
